Article: Second impact pic with the tree of life
[]: Second impact pic with the tree of life?             Quote Post by caladan » Sat Nov 03, 2007 3:16 am Does anybody remember seeing this picture, where you see the roots of the tree of life in the background? Im trying to find it through the search function, and it hasnt really worked for me.

[]:             Quote Post by Sheer Heart Attack » Sat Nov 03, 2007 3:21 am This idea, if I'm right in what you're referring to, was debunked a while back on here by Kaysow. This should clear things up. Edit - after a bit of searching, I found Kaysow's original thread on the matter.

[]:             Quote Post by caladan » Sat Nov 03, 2007 3:47 am thanks for the reply. i remember when it first started back in 06, then I lost interest until rebuild came along, and found that most of my links for animenation were broken. it seemed to make so much sense, and was like a reward for analysing the anime scene by scene ... man this is dissappointing :(
